The energies    and    angular    distributions    of
photoneutrons from the reaction C-12(g,no)C-11  were
measured.  The  data were obtained at bremsstrahlung
end-point energy of 30.5 MeV for 7 angles from 50 to
146  degrees.  The  results  indicate the absence of
significant E2 strength in the C-12 giant  resonance
and suggest that the main excitation mechanism is of
a 1p3/2 to 1d5/2 E1  single-particle  character.  By
the compiler:   the   neutron  energy  spectra  data
between E = 1.60 and 6.00 Mev  were  digitized  with
the constant  step from experimental points have not
been resolved. Main features of experimental neutron
energy  spectra  were  conserved.  It  was unable to
